goal: Add a side-effect-free evidence pack for BPK-071 cockpit patch operator dry-runs, bundling dry-run refs and simulated steps without applying patches, changing server, route, renderer, runtime, package, workflow, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, or writes.
scope_out: Do not apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, change renderer files, enable cockpit actions, call AICOS, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Cockpit operator dry-run evidence can be bundled without applying the patch.
Ready BPK-071 dry-run and evidence refs are required.
assumptions: Actual cockpit patch application requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing evidence ref, and blocked dry-run cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Server mutation, route mutation, renderer mutation, executable actions, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-071 simulated cockpit server patch application without applying patches.
